passives.desc:
When the Wings Part is broken, inflict [MRcAiBb] equal to [MRcAiBa] Stack to the last attacker; then, all [MRcAiBa] on self expires.

When using 'Ardor Blossom Star' at 0 [MRcAiBa], use 'Stoke the Flames' as well
passives.name: Stoke the Flames

passives.desc:
If this unit has [MRcAiBa], convert a number of non-Wrath Skills equal to [MRcAiBa] Stack into Wrath Skills

On Hit, inflict [Combustion] equal to (# of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn)

On Hit, heal HP equal to (# of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn x 2)
passives.name: Interlocking Ardor Blossom

passives.desc: Convert a number of non-Wrath Skills equal to [MRcAiBa] Stack into Wrath Skills
passives.name: Flaming Ember

passives.desc: When the Wings Part is broken, gain 2 E.G.O Resource of all Affinity and heal all Sinners' SP by 15
passives.name: Supply Resources

descs:

- Inflict 10 [Combustion]
- Inflict +2 [Combustion] Count
- Inflict 2 [MRcAiBc]
- [MRcAiBb] expires completely

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Inflict +2 [Combustion] Count
[WinDuel] Inflict [Combustion] equal to [Combustion] on target
[DefeatDuel] Gain the following effects:
- Damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
- If this is a Wrath Skill, remove [Combustion] on the target
- Halve the amount of [Combustion] and [Combustion] Count this Skill inflicts
skills.name: Spark

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [Combustion] Count equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn

[OnSucceedAttackHead] Against the enemy with the lowest Speed, inflict [Combustion] equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn

skills.desc: [WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Combustion], this Skill gains Clash Power +2
skills.name: Dust Explosion

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [Combustion] equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Against the enemy with the slowest Speed, Inflict [Combustion] and [Combustion] Count equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [Combustion] equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Against the enemy with the slowest Speed, Inflict [Combustion] and [Combustion] Count equal to the number of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Raise the target's Stagger Threshold by 70% of damage dealt
- Inflict 10 [Combustion] against targets that have been Staggered by this

skills.desc:
Gain Clash Power equal to (# of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn x2)
[WhenUse] Inflict (# of Wrath Skills that the Ardor Blossom Moth will use this turn x2) [Combustion] to all enemies
[DefeatDuel] Gain the following effects:
- This Attack Skill deals 0 damage
- Remove [Combustion] from all targets
- Halve the amount of [Combustion] and [Combustion] Count this Skill inflicts
skills.name: Ardor Blossom Star

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Base Power +1 for every 4 [Combustion] on target (max 3)
[WhenUse] Inflict 4 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain 1 [MRcAiBa] next turn
skills.name: Evade

skills.desc:
[CantDuel] [CantChangeTarget]
Damage dealt by this Attack Skill is fixed to 0
skills.name: Stoke the Flames

passives.desc:
After Clashing, inflict 1 [DuelEdge] against the target this unit Clashed against
In a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], heal 3 SP for every [DuelEdge] Stack on target (max 15)
passives.name: Duello

passives.desc:
Gain the following effects based on the target's [DuelEdge] Stack
- For every Stack, deal +5% damage against and take -5% damage from the target with [DuelEdge]
- At 1+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Clash Power +1
- At 2+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Base Power +1
- At 3+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Coin Power +1 and inflict 3 [SeveredTendon] On Hit
- At 4+ Stack, in a Clash against targets with [DuelEdge], gain Final Power +1
passives.name: Palermitan Style

passives.desc:
Every 3 turns, select a random enemy, reduce their Speed to 1, and target it with all of this unit's Skills
(If this effect could not be activated due to Stagger, activate it next turn)
passives.name: Hunter's Mark

passives.desc: If this unit's Skill effects triggered [VibrationExplosion], gain 2 [AttackUp] next turn (3 times per turn)
passives.name: Palermitan Rapier / The Cleaving Blade

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1
